about: Plan behavior-preserving code restructuring

## Background

Why refactor this area now?

## Current Problem

What makes the current code hard to change or test?

## Target Design

New modules, contracts, or boundaries.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] External behavior is unchanged
- [ ] Tests are added before or with the refactor
- [ ] One PR solves one refactor target
- [ ] `REFACTORING.md` is updated

## AI Usage Record

What did AI suggest and what did humans change?
